lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a cape like yours?

lines.speaker: Captain Rimor
lines.text: Of course, you have earned it.

lines.speaker: Captain Rimor
lines.text: Beware the Chambers of Xeric, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Captain Rimor
lines.text: These dungeons and the perils within them are unique. You will encounter both dangerous and mysterious creatures here.

lines.speaker: Captain Rimor
lines.text: Remember that you may be kicked out at any time - any items dropped on the ground will be lost inside.

lines.speaker: Captain Rimor
lines.text: Do not allow your curiosity to get the better of you.
